name: Kohl's Rewards Visa

verdict.text: Strong only for regular Kohl's shoppers who'll spend the Kohl's Cash

earn_note: The 7.5% at Kohl's is Capital One's marketing framing of 5% base Kohl's-member reward plus 2.5% for using this card instead of the store-only Kohl's Card. Every category — Kohl's, gas, grocery, and everything else — pays out in Kohl's Cash, not usable dollars, so the gas/grocery rates are really 'discounts good only at Kohl's,' not general cash back. No caps disclosed, but plenty of exclusions apply at Kohl's itself (Sephora, certain brands, gift cards).

points.per_100k: Not applicable — rewards accrue as a Kohl's Cash balance, not a points currency
points.note: Rewards convert to $5 Kohl's Cash increments on the 1st of the following month and expire just 30 days later. This short, hard-cutoff expiration is the single biggest catch on the card — unspent balances are simply forfeited, unlike BJ's or most cash-back cards where rewards sit indefinitely.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners — Kohl's Cash is a closed-loop, single-retailer currency with no travel or cash-out option.

protection_note: Visa Signature status brings 24/7 concierge and travel/emergency assistance, but Capital One's public terms don't document purchase protection, extended warranty, or trip coverage for this specific card — unlike some Visa Signature issuers, these benefits don't appear to be layered on here. Treat it as unprotected for big-ticket purchases.
rental_note: No rental car coverage documented for this card.

status_perks.name: Most Valuable Customer (MVC)
status_perks.note: Spend $600+ at Kohl's in a calendar year and unlock free standard shipping on Kohls.com for the following year.

services.name: 24-hour Visa Signature Concierge
services.detail: Reservation and travel-assistance concierge, standard Visa Signature benefit.

services.name: Kohl's-only promotions
services.detail: Monthly exclusive discounts and an annual cardholder-anniversary offer on top of standard Kohl's Cash earnings.

services.name: Card lock & account management
services.detail: Mobile app card lock, autopay, and flexible due-date selection via Capital One's servicing platform.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns the same Kohl's Cash rate (into your account)

additional_cards.note: Free to add — useful for consolidating a household's Kohl's spend to hit MVC status faster, but doesn't help beat the 30-day Kohl's Cash expiration.

timeline.text: Capital One introduced the Visa-branded Kohl's Rewards Visa alongside the long-standing store-only Kohl's Card, letting cardholders earn Kohl's Cash on purchases made anywhere Visa is accepted, not just at Kohl's.
Capital One became the issuer of Kohl's private-label credit cards, acquiring the existing portfolio from JPMorgan Chase.
